campaigns.name: Scale Beyond Pilots
campaigns.objective: Position Fresh Run Demo as the implementation partner that helps 80% of mid-market companies move from AI pilots to scaled, ROI-driving deployments within 90 days
campaigns.targetAudience: CEOs and Operations leaders at 50–500 employee businesses struggling to move AI initiatives beyond proof-of-concept phases
campaigns.positioning: Enterprise-grade AI implementation without enterprise complexity — we build, integrate, and deliver measurable ROI, not just strategy decks
keyMessages: Most AI pilots fail because they stop at discovery — we take you to deployment and ROI
Integration with legacy systems is our specialty — we bridge the gap between AI ambition and operational reality
We measure what matters — revenue impact, time saved, and efficiency gains, not just hours billed
contentThemes: Case studies showing real ROI from AI deployments in mid-market businesses
Technical deep dives on integrating AI with legacy ERPs, CRMs, and data systems
ROI calculators and frameworks that help leaders quantify AI investment value
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture through thought leadership and social proof
Phase 2: Consideration — nurture and educate with technical content and interactive ROI tools
Phase 3: Conversion — demo requests and SQL handoff through targeted webinars and personalized outreach
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish presence and top-funnel capture
successMetrics: MQL generation from 500+ qualified prospects per quarter
Conversion rate from MQL to SQL of 46% or higher

campaigns.name: Integration Expertise
campaigns.objective: Become the go-to partner for mid-market businesses needing AI systems that actually work with their existing technology stack
campaigns.targetAudience: IT Directors and CTOs at 50–500 employee businesses concerned about AI integration complexity and technical debt
campaigns.positioning: The only AI implementation partner that specializes in legacy system integration — we make AI work with what you already have, not what you wish you had
keyMessages: 73% of AI projects fail due to integration issues — we solve this as our primary expertise
We don't replace your systems — we enhance them with AI that respects your existing architecture
Your IT team stays in the loop — we build collaborative solutions, not black-box implementations
contentThemes: Technical case studies showcasing successful AI integrations with specific legacy systems
Architecture guides and integration pattern libraries for common enterprise tech stacks
Comparative content on build vs. advise approaches to AI implementation
phases: Phase 1: Awareness — establish technical credibility through architecture content and system compatibility messaging
Phase 2: Consideration — deep-dive technical content and interactive product demonstrations
Phase 3: Conversion — technical demos and proof-of-concept engagements
campaigns.currentPhase: Phase 1: Awareness — establish technical credibility through architecture content and system compatibility messaging
successMetrics: Technical content engagement rate of 30% or higher
Product tour conversion rate of 25% or higher to trial
SQL conversion from product tours of 25% or higher

infrastructure.funnelStrategy: Multi-touch progression from top-of-funnel educational content through nurturing sequences to conversion. SEO drives broad awareness, email nurture educates and warms prospects, webinars provide social proof, and product tours enable high-intent conversion. Progressive profiling ensures we capture signals without friction at each stage.
conversionPaths: Primary: Educational content → Webinar attendance → Product tour → Qualified demo request → SQL handoff
Secondary: SEO-driven blog content → Progressive profiling → Trigger-based email nurture → High-score lead → SQL handoff
infrastructure.nurtureApproach: Segmented nurture tracks based on audience role and engagement behavior. Top-of-funnel prospects receive educational content on AI adoption challenges and ROI frameworks. Mid-funnel prospects engage with technical integration case studies and architecture deep dives. Bottom-funnel prospects receive personalized case studies, ROI calculators, and direct outreach. All sequences emphasize integration expertise and measurable outcomes over hours billed.

scoringSignals: Content engagement depth (pages per session, time on page)
Role-based behavior (CEO/CTO/IT Director actions weighted higher)
Webinar attendance and product tour completion
Explicit interest signals (demo requests, RFP downloads)
leadQualification.qualificationThreshold: 40+ points = MQL for marketing qualification, 60+ points = SQL ready for sales engagement, 80+ points = Hot lead requiring immediate attention
leadQualification.routingGuidance: MQLs enter nurture sequences and receive educational content. SQLs trigger sales outreach within 24 hours. Hot leads receive executive-level attention and dedicated solution design sessions.

salesHandoff.owner: Account executives with AI implementation experience, supported by solution architects for technical qualification
salesHandoff.process: Automated handoff with context-rich lead profiles including engagement history, firmographic data, role behavior, and explicit pain points. Sales receives 24-hour SLA for initial contact and 7-day SLA for qualified opportunity creation.
requiredContext: Lead engagement history across all touchpoints
Explicit pain point indicators and interest signals
Competitive landscape and budget timeframe if captured

measurementPlan: Top-of-funnel: Organic traffic growth, engagement rate, social impressions
Mid-funnel: MQL volume and quality, nurture sequence engagement rates, webinar attendance
Bottom-funnel: SQL conversion rate (target 46%+), demo-to-qualified-opportunity rate, sales cycle length
Business outcome: Revenue influenced by AI adoption services, customer acquisition cost, ROI measurement from client implementations
